abilities.name: Hard to Kill
abilities.text: When this model suffers damage, if it has 2 or more health, it may not be reduced to below 1 health.

abilities.name: Pile o' Parts
abilities.text: When a friendly model activates within 6", it may gain an Improvised Part token.

actions.name: Gooped
actions.effects: If this action receives a raise, the target gains a Staggered token.

triggers.name: Dismember
triggers.text: Make a Remains marker in base contact with the target.

actions.name: "That's Still Good!"
actions.effects: Place this model into base contact with the target, then remove the target. Barricade: This model gains a Bolstered token.

actions.name: Spilled Bolts
actions.effects: Make a Remains marker within range. Enemies within (aura)2" of the marker must pass a TN 12 Sp duel or gain a Staggered token. Faceplant: Deal 2 damage to enemy models that failed the duel.

actions.name: Repurpose Parts
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Target must discard a card or this model may remove any number of tokens from it.
actions.effects: Saved For Later: Draw a card for each token removed (maximum 2).
